Joel Siegal, Esq. (510.271.6720; joelsiegal@yahoo.com) of Siegal & Richardson, LLP for Plaintiff.

DEFENDANT UNION SQUARE BUSINESS IMPROVEMENT DISTRICT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is DENIED.
